summary: All 4 SKILL.md files are structurally compliant, well under the 500-line limit, and follow skill-master patterns correctly. Cross-skill consistency is strong: naming conventions, token references, file name validation regex, and writing tone are uniform. The like-figma directory has been successfully removed. Two minor findings identified: library-catalog.md is unreferenced from any skill, and the design-retrospective skill has no links to shared design references despite operating on design system artifacts.

findings.issue: library-catalog.md is not referenced from any SKILL.md file. No skill links to this shared reference, making it unreachable through normal skill execution.
findings.recommendation: Add an action-embedded link from design-generate/SKILL.md Phase 3.1 or design-system-init/SKILL.md Phase 2.6 (component selection step), e.g.: 'Suggest icon library from [library-catalog.md](../../shared/design-references/library-catalog.md) matching the project stack.'

findings.issue: design-retrospective has zero links to shared design references. While it operates on .design-system/ files at runtime, it could benefit from referencing color-psychology.md or color-principles.md when categorizing color-related corrections in Phase 2.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding an optional reference link in Phase 2 for color correction categorization: 'For color correction analysis, apply terminology from [color-psychology.md](../../shared/design-references/color-psychology.md).' This is low priority since the skill's primary job is pattern extraction, not color theory application.

findings.issue: Phase 3.2 instruction 'Replace placeholder tokens in :root with actual values from tokens.json' (line 87) is step 5 but is described separately from the template substitution steps 2-4. The preview-template.html already contains placeholder token values in :root, so the instruction to 'replace placeholder tokens' could be confused with the PAGE_STYLES substitution.
findings.recommendation: Clarify that steps 2-4 handle the three {{placeholders}}, while step 5 means replacing the default token values already in the template's :root block with project-specific values from tokens.json.

findings.issue: The CSP meta tag allows style-src 'self' but since the HTML files are opened as local files (file:// protocol), 'self' has no meaningful origin to match. Only 'unsafe-inline' and the Google Fonts URL are functionally active.
findings.recommendation: This is cosmetic and does not reduce security. The 'self' directive is harmless but technically inert for file:// usage. No change required; document this in a comment if desired.

details.design-system-init: 171 lines, procedural skill with 5 phases (0-4) + Final Check. Frontmatter has name + description with trigger phrases. Checkpoints after each phase. Self-verification checklist at end. Fully compliant.
details.design-generate: 149 lines, procedural skill with 5 phases (0-4) + Final Check. Frontmatter correct. Checkpoints present. Context exhaustion handling in Phase 4.3. Fully compliant.
details.design-review: 111 lines, informational skill. Decision framework table present (When to Activate). Scope Guard section defines boundaries. No forced sequential structure. Fully compliant.
details.design-retrospective: 167 lines, procedural skill with 5 phases (1-5) + Self-Verification. Checkpoints after each phase. Duplicate detection logic. Fully compliant.

cross_skill_consistency.details: Token naming uses consistent --{category}-{path} pattern across all skills. File name validation regex /^[a-z0-9-]+$/ used identically in design-system-init and design-generate. Component path .design-system/components/{name}.html consistent. Page path .design-system/pages/{name}.html consistent. Writing tone is direct and instructional throughout. Russian used in design-retrospective output (as specified), English elsewhere.

reference_link_validity.details: All 10 reference links in SKILL.md files resolve to existing files. design-system-init: 4 links (color-psychology, color-principles, font-pairing, design-tokens). design-generate: 6 links (design-tokens, component-patterns x2, generation-guide, grid-techniques, preview-template). design-review: 2 links (design-tokens, color-principles). design-retrospective: 0 links. No backslashes in any link path.

content_quality.details: All references contain substantive, actionable content. color-psychology.md: 323 lines with 10 color-emotion mappings and summary table. color-principles.md: 186 lines with 10 concrete principles with CSS examples. font-pairing.md: 195 lines with 10 font combinations ready for tokens.json. component-patterns.md: 143 lines with BEM patterns and CSS examples. generation-guide.md: 237 lines with 15 layout patterns and selection table. grid-techniques.md: 227 lines with 10 advanced CSS grid techniques. design-tokens.md: 113 lines with complete JSON schema. library-catalog.md: 103 lines with 13 libraries. No boilerplate detected.

no_duplication.details: Shared references (design-tokens, color-psychology, color-principles, library-catalog) exist only in shared/design-references/. Skill-specific references (font-pairing, component-patterns, generation-guide, grid-techniques) exist only in their respective skill directories. No content copied between locations.

integration_correctness.details: do-task Step 2.4 contains the design-review hook as a single numbered item. Placed after git commit (Step 2.3) and before reviewers (Step 2.5). Two guard conditions: tokens.json exists AND UI files changed. Explicit 'skip silently' for false conditions. Explicit scope limit: 'This hook calls ONLY design-review, not the full design pipeline.'

security.details: preview-template.html line 6: CSP meta tag with script-src 'none' (blocks all JS execution). style-src allows 'unsafe-inline' (needed for embedded styles) and fonts.googleapis.com. File name validation regex /^[a-z0-9-]+$/ present in both design-system-init (lines 117, 156, 169) and design-generate (lines 97, 147) with explicit rationale 'prevents path traversal'.

like_figma_directory.details: skills/like-figma/ does not exist. Successfully removed in Task 8.

emphasis_words.details: Zero emphasis words (CRITICAL, MANDATORY, NEVER, IMPORTANT, MUST) found in any of the 4 design SKILL.md files. Compliant with skill-master guideline of max 1.
